rule: hit = (kw>=2) OR (sem>=0.7) OR (func>=0.7); independent scoring per result
candidate_summary: TRICHOBOTHRIA per-head fixed bandpass cos*Gaussian frequency mask with geometric f_k spacing across heads (f_k = f_0 * 2^(k/H)); multi-octave layer cascade — combines (i) per-head geometric frequency assignment, (ii) cos*Gaussian bandpass positional bias, (iii) layer cascade integration.

results_analysis.title: ALiBi: Attention with Linear Biases (ICLR 2022)
results_analysis.rationale: ALiBi is the EXACT architectural twin: per-head static positional bias with GEOMETRIC SERIES slopes 2^{-k/H} across H heads. TRICHOBOTHRIA's only substitution is cos*Gaussian for linear-in-distance; the per-head-geometric-spacing-static-bias slot is identical.

results_analysis.title: Attention with Linear Biases (ALiBi)
results_analysis.rationale: Same ALiBi mechanism explicitly described as per-head bias slope in geometric distribution — matches candidate's per-head geometric f_k slot.

results_analysis.title: ALiBi: Attention with Linear Biases (Abhik)
results_analysis.rationale: ALiBi explainer with per-head geometric prior; same architectural pattern as candidate.

results_analysis.title: On the Emergence of Position Bias in Transformers (2502.01951)
results_analysis.rationale: Position-bias-emergence analysis; passes kw>=2 and sem>=0.7 thresholds. Not the same cos*Gaussian construct but lies in same architectural family.

results_analysis.title: Hallucination Detection LLMs via Spectral Features of Attention Maps (EMNLP 2025)
results_analysis.rationale: Spectral analysis of attention maps; passes all three thresholds. Related but a probe-on-attention rather than masking construct.

results_analysis.title: High-frequency Multi-spectral Attention Domain Generalization (Springer 2025)
results_analysis.rationale: Passes kw>=2 and sem>=0.7. Vision-domain HMCA multi-spectral attention; conceptually adjacent.

results_analysis.title: Hallucination Detection Spectral Features (EMNLP 2025 PDF)
results_analysis.rationale: Duplicate of rank 5; same spectral attention construct passing all three thresholds.

results_analysis.title: VISIONARY Spatial-Spectral Attention (WACV 2025)
results_analysis.rationale: Hyperspectral image denoising; vision-domain only, fails all three thresholds.

verdict_sentence: Candidate FAILS verification: 7 of 8 results are hits (well above the threshold of 1), with ranks 1-3 (ALiBi family) showing exact per-head-geometric-series-static-positional-bias architectural twins — the candidate's substitution of cos*Gaussian for linear distance does not constitute novelty over ALiBi's established per-head geometric-slope structure, and additional spectral-attention prior art (ranks 5,7) further saturates the design space.
